'''yogadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocabular|vocabular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocabular|vocabular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yogadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogadhithi|yogadhithi]] || [[word:yogadhiji|yogadhiji]] || [[word:yogadhishi|yogadhishi]] || [[word:yogadhiki|yogadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogadhuthuthu|yogadhuthuthu]] || [[word:yogadhujuju|yogadhujuju]] || [[word:yogadhushushu|yogadhushushu]] || [[word:yogadhukuku|yogadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogadhuthu|yogadhuthu]] || [[word:yogadhuju|yogadhuju]] || [[word:yogadhushu|yogadhushu]] || [[word:yogadhuku|yogadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogadhufthuf|yogadhufthuf]] || [[word:yogadhufjuf|yogadhufjuf]] || [[word:yogadhufshuf|yogadhufshuf]] || [[word:yogadhufkuf|yogadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogadhethe|yogadhethe]] || [[word:yogadheje|yogadheje]] || [[word:yogadheshe|yogadheshe]] || [[word:yogadheke|yogadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogadhothotho|yogadhothotho]] || [[word:yogadhojojo|yogadhojojo]] || [[word:yogadhoshosho|yogadhoshosho]] || [[word:yogadhokoko|yogadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogadhotho|yogadhotho]] || [[word:yogadhojo|yogadhojo]] || [[word:yogadhosho|yogadhosho]] || [[word:yogadhoko|yogadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogadhofthof|yogadhofthof]] || [[word:yogadhofjof|yogadhofjof]] || [[word:yogadhofshof|yogadhofshof]] || [[word:yogadhofkof|yogadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:yogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|yogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yogadhĂŠthĂŠ|yogadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yogadhĂŠjĂŠ|yogadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yogadhĂŠshĂŠ|yogadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yogadhĂŠkĂŠ|yogadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yogadhathatha|yogadhathatha]] || [[word:yogadhajaja|yogadhajaja]] || [[word:yogadhashasha|yogadhashasha]] || [[word:yogadhakaka|yogadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yogadhatha|yogadhatha]] || [[word:yogadhaja|yogadhaja]] || [[word:yogadhasha|yogadhasha]] || [[word:yogadhaka|yogadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yogadhafthaf|yogadhafthaf]] || [[word:yogadhafjaf|yogadhafjaf]] || [[word:yogadhafshaf|yogadhafshaf]] || [[word:yogadhafkaf|yogadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yogadhasha|yogadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yogadhshĂ«sha|yogadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yogadhrosha|yogadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yogadhmusha|yogadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yogadhyasha|yogadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyogadhnkshĂ«sha|goyogadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyogadhnkrosha|goyogadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyogadhnkmusha|goyogadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyogadhnkyasha|goyogadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yogagadhasha|yogagadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yogagadhshĂ«sha|yogagadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yogagadhrosha|yogagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yogagadhmusha|yogagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yogagadhyasha|yogagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyogagadhnkshĂ«sha|goyogagadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyogagadhnkrosha|goyogagadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyogagadhnkmusha|goyogagadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyogagadhnkyasha|goyogagadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yegĂŠdhasha|yegĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yegĂŠdhshĂ«sha|yegĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yegĂŠdhrosha|yegĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yegĂŠdhmusha|yegĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yegĂŠdhyasha|yegĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyegĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|goyegĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyegĂŠdhnkrosha|goyegĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyegĂŠdhnkmusha|goyegĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyegĂŠdhnkyasha|goyegĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yogfadhasha|yogfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yogfadhshĂ«sha|yogfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yogfadhrosha|yogfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yogfadhmusha|yogfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yogfadhyasha|yogfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyogfadhnkshĂ«sha|goyogfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyogfadhnkrosha|goyogfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyogfadhnkmusha|goyogfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyogfadhnkyasha|goyogfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
